zh.Dundaff Castle, Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotla: 英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sibilla Graham於1298年出生在英國蘇格蘭艾斯爾登努時，她的父親Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale21歲，母親Isabella Kirkpatrick23歲。她和Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於大約1333年在英國蘇格蘭洛-爾享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sibilla Graham于1298年出生在英国苏格兰艾斯爾登努时，她的父亲Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale21岁，母亲Isabella Kirkpatrick23岁。她和Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于大约1333年在英国苏格兰洛-爾享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Graham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, recorded in Domesday Book as Graham (as well as Grantham, Grandham, and Granham). See also Grantham .

Irish (especially Ulster): in Ireland Graham is generally the Scottish name, but it has additionally been adopted as an Anglicized form of both Ó Creacháin (see Crehan ) and Ó Gormghaile (see Gormley ).

History: The surname Graham was taken to Scotland at the beginning of the 12th century by the Norman baron William de Graham, holder of the manor of Grantham in Lincolnshire, from whom many if not all modern bearers are probably descended. The chief of Clan Graham is the Duke of Montrose.

variants.name: Greim
meanings: South German: from a short form of a compound personal name beginning with the element grīm ‘mask, helmet’.

variants.name: Grahm
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): shortened form of   Graham  .

variants.name: Grantham
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and East Yorkshire): habitational name from Grantham in Lincolnshire, of uncertain origin. The final element is Old English hām ‘homestead’; the first may be Old English grand ‘gravel’ or perhaps a personal name Granta, which probably originated as a byname meaning ‘snarler’. See also Graham .

variants.name: Grahame
meanings: Scottish: variant of   Graham  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 261, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

nameMeanings.name: Sibilla
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sybilla
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

variants.name: Sibella
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sibilla Graham was born in 1298, in Dunure, Ayrshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, was 21 and her mother, Isabella Kirkpatrick, was 23. She had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams. She died about 1333, in Ross-shire, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sibilla Graham est née en 1298, à Dunure, Ayrshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabella Kirkpatrick, avait 23 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams. Elle est décédée environ 1333, à Ross-shire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sibilla Graham 1298 in Dunure, Ayrshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale 21 und ihre Mutter Isabella Kirkpatrick 23. Sie hatte mit Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb um 1333 im Alter von 36 Jahren in Ross-shire, Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla Graham è nata il nel 1298 nel Dunure, Ayrshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabella Kirkpatrick, aveva 23 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams. Morì circa 1333, nel Ross-shire, Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sibilla Grahamが1298年にイギリススコットランドエイルシュアイアダヌアで生まれた時，父Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdaleは21歳，母Isabella Kirkpatrickは23歳であった。彼女はSir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdamsとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は約1333年にイギリススコットランドロス-シュアイアで36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sibilla Graham(이)가 1298년 영국 스코틀랜드 에이르실르 던르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabella Kirkpatrick(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1333년 영국 스코틀랜드 로스-실르에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sibilla Graham nasceu em 1298, em Dunure, Ayrshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabella Kirkpatrick, tinha 23 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1333, em Ross-shire, Escócia, United Kingdom, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sibilla Graham родилась в 1298 г. в местности дунур, аиршир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabella Kirkpatrick, 23. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Sir Reginald de Mure of Abercorn and Cowdams. Она умерла около 1333 г. в местности росс-шир, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sibilla Graham nació en 1298, en Dunure, Ayrshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Graham of Dalkeith, Abercorn and Eskdale, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabella Kirkpatrick, tenía 23 años.
